title: Oscar Leonard Help Im Psychic
description: Oscar's life was perfectly fine until a drunken encounter with a psychic turned everything upside down. Now he's stuck with mind-reading powers he didn't ask for and definitely can't control. Tonight, you'll witness something very unpredictable: Oscar learning to harness his abilities in real-time. Oscar will attempt to read your thoughts (with varying degrees of success), predict futures that haven't happened yet, and subtly influence decisions you haven't even made. Some moments will astonish you. Others might spectacularly misfire — but that's half the fun. This isn't your typical mind-reading show. It's funnier, messier, and far more honest. Oscar combines comedy with mentalism, weaving everything into a narrative that pulls you from sceptical observer to active participant. You're not just watching someone perform tricks—you're joining him on a journey of coming to terms with his newfound abilities. Will he succeed? Who knows. Will there be chaos along the way? Absolutely.
content_warnings: This show may contain occasional strong language

venue.name: Upstairs @ The Colly
venue.address: Colonnade Bar, 10 New Road, East Sussex
